title: Validate link frame parse/write NULL parameters
description: Trigger: a local caller passes NULL for frame, data, or buf to the public lichen_frame_parse()/lichen_frame_write() helpers. lichen/subsys/lichen/link/frame.c reads data[0] around line 44 and frame->addr_mode around line 109 before validating pointers. Impact: malformed API use crashes the node instead of returning -EINVAL, unlike most neighboring LICHEN C APIs. Add entry-point NULL checks for frame/data/buf and tests for those error paths.
close_reason: Implemented fixes in assigned subagents and ran available focused checks; full Zephyr builds remain blocked by existing workspace/module setup issues.
